how to calculate fica tip credit for employers Preparation Checklist for Dallas Ft Worth Clients

Before your how to calculate fica tip credit for employers appointment with Reclaim Tax Credits, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credits at 1-213-537-5613 to get started.
